description_long: This object consists of a group of various road traffic signs, each mounted on a slender metallic pole. The signs display a range of shapes including circles, rectangles, and diamonds, and feature a variety of colors such as red, blue, yellow, and white. The faces of the signs show different regulatory, warning, and informational symbols, including speed limits, directional arrows, pedestrian crossings, and bicycle paths. The poles are thin and metallic, likely made of galvanized steel, and the sign faces appear to be made of reflective metal or aluminum with printed or painted graphics. The signs are arranged in a straight line, suggesting a display or storage configuration rather than real-world placement. The overall construction is lightweight but sturdy, suitable for temporary or permanent installation in urban environments.
description: A collection of variously shaped and colored road traffic signs mounted on thin metallic poles, displaying regulatory, warning, and informational symbols.
description_view_0: Front view showing the faces of all traffic signs with clear visibility of their symbols and colors.
description_view_1: Side view showing the thin profile of the poles and the signs, with almost no detail visible on the sign faces.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the signs, which are plain and lack any visible symbols or text.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing only the thin poles and the edge of the signs, with no face details visible.
attribute_symbol_or_pictogram: Speed limit, no entry, directional arrows, pedestrian, bicycle, intersection, warning triangles, and other standard road symbols.
attribute_location_context: urban roadside, intersections, pedestrian crossings, and bike paths
